{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Second figure
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A second figure in burnt orange clothes entered through the window.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
